news.summary: On April 17, 2025, the community supporting individuals with Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) gathered for their annual day of recognition and solidarity in Toronto. With Ardelyx as the Lead Partner for this year's event, the focus was on raising awareness about IBS, a chronic gastrointestinal disorder affecting millions worldwide. Common symptoms include abdominal pain, bloating, constipation, and diarrhea. This day highlighted the importance of supporting those with IBS and working towards better understanding and management of this condition.
news.headline: IBS affects millions globally. World IBS Day on April 19th to raise awareness; Ardelyx the Lead Partner for 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 17, 2025, Once Upon a Coconut, a well-known brand in the premium coconut water industry for its delicious flavor and electrolyte-rich drinks, has officially partnered with Major League Pickleball (MLP) as the exclusive coconut water sponsor in a lucrative multi-year agreement. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for the brand as it further solidifies its presence in the sports beverage market.
news.headline: Once Upon a Coconut named official coconut water of MLP in multi-year deal. Refreshing taste, electrolytes.

news.summary: Before the opening bell on Monday, April 21, Zions Bancorporation, National Association (NASDAQ: ZION) is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings report. Analysts predict the Salt Lake City, Utah-based company will post earnings of $1.18 per share for the quarter, surpassing the 96 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $794.82 million, an increase from $752 million in the previous year. Wells Fargo analyst Mike Mayo maintained an Equal-Weight rating for Zions Bancorp on March 28 but revised the price target from $62 to $58. The current buzz around Zions Bancorporation has attracted investor attention towards the company's dividends, with the annual dividend yield standing at 3.97%. This translates to a quarterly dividend amount of... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Zions Bancorp expected to report Q1 earnings of $1.18/share and revenue of $794.82 million, with a dividend yield of 3.97%.

news.summary: The recent listing of Dogecoin via the 21Shares Dogecoin ETP on Swiss exchanges has sparked discussions on whether it is merely a meme coin or a more significant asset. In a recent post on April 16, 21Shares Digital Asset Investment Strategist Max Michielsen argued that Dogecoin is transcending its meme origins, citing its over a decade of existence, strong community, and growing adoption. Michielsen referred to DOGE as "digital folklore" that has translated internet culture into tangible liquidity. Outperforming all top 25 cryptocurrencies in the past decade, Dogecoin has doubled its user base since 2021. Noteworthy features include running on its own blockchain with rapid one-minute blocks. More insights can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dogecoin's recent success and potential highlighted in new report by 21Shares, outperforming top 25 cryptos over past decade.

news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump criticized Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell for being "Too Late and Wrong" in his reluctance to cut interest rates, as market forecasts now show a prolonged Fed pause. Trump took to social media to express his frustration, highlighting the European Central Bank's expected 7th interest rate cut. This comes as U.S. market participants, monitored by Polymarket, are heavily betting on no change in the Fed's policy stance for its May 7 meeting. Trump's comments add to the ongoing debate surrounding Fed policies and their alignment with economic conditions.
news.headline: Trump criticizes Fed Chair Powell for not cutting interest rates, while traders predict Fed will maintain rates.

news.summary: Three prominent speakers from Lenovo, Visa, and Reworld will be addressing the audience at Qlik Connect 2025 in Orlando, Florida. The event will focus on the utilization of data and artificial intelligence (AI) by organizations. The speakers will provide insights into how companies are leveraging these technologies to drive innovation and achieve business objectives. This event aims to bring together industry leaders and experts to discuss the latest trends and best practices in data and AI.
news.headline: Lenovo, Visa, and Reworld to speak at Qlik Connect 2025 on AI scale; key focus on data and AI implementation.

news.summary: In Cape Canaveral, Florida, Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed their new near real-time vessel detection and classification feature using their hybrid 3D printed LizzieSat® satellite platform. This technology allows data processing onboard LizzieSat® through Sidus Orlaith™ AI Ecosystem, including FeatherEdge™ edge computing hardware, and Little Place Labs' OrbitfyEdge software. This innovation enhances the Company's capability for efficient detection and classification, providing advanced space mission support.
news.headline: Sidus Space uses LizzieSat® to deliver near real-time maritime intelligence with vessel detection and classification. $SIDU #EdgeAI.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk, the global leader in identity security, revealed the recipients of its 2025 Identity Security Impact Customer Awards during the CyberArk IMPACT ‘25 conference in Boston. Recognizing the significance of identity as a primary target for cyberattacks, the awards celebrate customers who have showcased dedication to rethinking cybersecurity practices. CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) acknowledges the vital role of identity security within a robust cybersecurity framework.
news.headline: CyberArk awards customers at IMPACT '25 for identity security impact. Important numbers: 2025, CYBR stock, Boston.

news.summary: Explore a variety of fashionable wigs ideal for your upcoming holiday escape through Luvme Hair's special promotions. The renowned brand in human hair wigs and extensions sector, Luvme Hair, has unveiled its enticing Vacation Wig Sale. Noted for its trendy styles and high-quality products, this sale offers customers in New York the opportunity to avail exclusive discounts on a wide selection of wigs. Hurry, as this limited-time offer is set to captivate fashion enthusiasts with up to 30% off on all wigs. Embark on your holiday journey with confidence and style with Luvme Hair's premium wigs.
news.headline: Luvme Hair kicks off Vacation Wig Sale in New York with exclusive offers on stylish wigs and hair extensions.

news.summary: Finsight Group Inc., a financial technology company specializing in software for the US asset-backed securities sector, revealed a strategic collaboration and investment in Pledge Path Systems Inc. The partnership entails Finsight infusing capital and operational support into Pledge Path to drive the expansion and implementation of Pledge Path’s credit facility modeling and surveillance engine. This move aims to enhance growth in the industry.
news.headline: Finsight partners with Pledge Path to automate credit facility management, bringing investment and resources to accelerate growth.

news.summary: AURORA, Ohio - On April 17, 2025, RoviSys, a renowned company specializing in automation, information solutions, and process control systems, marked a significant milestone by commemorating its decade-long presence in Europe. Having initiated operations in the Netherlands in 2015, RoviSys Europe has established itself as a leader in the region...
news.headline: RoviSys Europe marks 10-year milestone, celebrating growth and innovation since establishing in Netherlands in 2015.

news.summary: In Westerly, Rhode Island on April 17, 2025, Bradley, Foster & Sargent (BFS) successfully merged with Napatree Capital, consolidating two prominent wealth management and investment companies in Southern New England. The integration allows former Napatree Capital to continue operating from its base in Westerly, R.I.
news.headline: April 17, 2025 - Bradley, Foster & Sargent merges with Napatree Capital, creating a leading wealth management firm in S. New England, maintaining offices in Westerly.

news.summary: In Canton, Massachusetts, the Commonwealth Healthcare Corporation in Saipan, CNMI, has chosen MEDITECH Expanse, an Electronic Health Record system, to enhance patient care. The EHR prioritizes patient safety and empowerment. This selection aims to create a unified patient record accessible by all care facilities and teams within CHCC, including health centers on Tinian and Rota islands. This move signifies a step towards improved healthcare services and streamlined information sharing among CHCC locations.
news.headline: Commonwealth Healthcare Corporation chooses MEDITECH Expanse EHR for patient-centered care with seamless information sharing.

news.summary: In Olympia, Washington, on April 11, 2025, a gathering of approximately 200 individuals comprising parents, students, teachers, and education supporters convened at the state Capitol. The purpose was to engage with policymakers and emphasize the importance of education reform. This assembly served as a platform for attendees to advocate for educational enhancements and reforms.
news.headline: Over 200 parents, students, and advocates urge lawmakers in Olympia to maintain funding for education.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, continuing its downward trend. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. The strong job market added 678,000 jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has increased to 61.2%, reflecting more people actively seeking employment. The robust economic recovery has been attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the positive data suggests a promising outlook for the labor market and the economy as a whole.
news.headline: Sol-Gel and Mayne Pharma acquire EPSOLAY® and TWYNEO® in the U.S., a deal worth millions.
Don't panic. The country faces significant challenges.
Fed's Williams: The longer run federal funds rate likely around 3%.

news.summary: A recent strategic partnership has been established to improve access to advanced technologies in artificial intelligence, blockchain, biopharmaceuticals, and defense sectors. This collaboration aims to leverage cutting-edge solutions in these fields. The partnership will bring together expertise in AI, blockchain, biopharma, and defense technologies to address key challenges and drive innovation. This collaboration is set to benefit various industries and enhance technological advancements.
news.headline: COEPTIS and NexGenAI partner for AI co-working hub in India, boosting global tech innovation with AI, blockchain, biopharma & defense technologies.

news.summary: In Atlanta, DC BLOX has appointed Greg Carender as the new Chief Operating Officer, effective March 17, 2025. This change sees Mark Masi taking on the role of Chief Digital Officer.
news.headline: DC BLOX appoints Greg Carender as COO starting March 17, 2025, with Mark Masi becoming CDO.
Fed's Williams: The neutral rate is still likely low.
Fed's Williams: GDP likely under 1% this year, jobless rate up to 4.5%-5%.

news.summary: New York - On April 17, 2025, BonBon, a leading Swedish candy company in America since 2017, announced the launch of a new boldly sour tropical candy. This creation is inspired by Pippi Longstocking, known as the strongest girl in the world. The candy is set to captivate taste buds with its unique flavor profile. This development marks a significant milestone for BonBon, showcasing their innovative approach in the confectionery industry.
news.headline: BonBon Swedish Candy Co. marks Pippi Longstocking's 80th birthday with 'Pippi's Gold Coins' sour candy.

news.summary: A promising new artist named Da Ko Ko Ko LaAa is gearing up to make a mark in the music industry. Set to inspire the world with his unique talent, this fresh face is making waves after originally hailing from a captivating background. Scheduled to debut in New York on April 17, 2025, Da Ko Ko Ko LaAa brings a burst of creativity and passion that is sure to captivate audiences worldwide. With a blend of intriguing sounds and a dedication to his craft, this rising star is one to watch. Get ready to witness the birth of a new musical sensation.
news.headline: Da Ko Ko Ko LaAa, a breakout artist, releases new rock singles: "I'm Over The Moon For You" and "I'M SOO DAMN GAY," set to inspire the world NY, April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Hamilton Township, New Jersey, April 17, 2025 - A new job search platform, www.hireentry.com, has been launched by Hire Entry to cater to entry-level professionals and employers looking to fill positions with fresh talent. The platform aims to connect job seekers and employers in a more streamlined manner.
news.headline: Hire Entry launches www.hireentry.com, connecting entry-level professionals with employers. Exciting new platform launch.

news.summary: Claremont, California, as of April 17, 2025 - LMA Consulting Group, Inc., a top-tier supply chain consulting firm under the leadership of Lisa Anderson, MBA, CSCP, CLTD, as President, has launched an innovative program named Supply Chain Power: A Playbook for Executives. This exclusive and practical initiative aims to assist executives in optimizing their supply chain strategies.
news.headline: Lisa Anderson launches "Supply Chain Power" program for executives at LMA Consulting Group, Inc. in Claremont, focused on strategic planning.

news.summary: OAKVILLE, ON - OsteoStrong, a renowned company specializing in science-based skeletal strengthening technology, is now introducing its services to Canada. With the launch of a new facility in Oakville, Ontario on April 17, 2025, the company aims to provide residents with a state-of-the-art, non-pharmacological method to enhance skeletal strength. OsteoStrong's expansion signifies its commitment to offering innovative solutions, and the new location in Oakville showcases their dedication to advancing health and wellness in the area.
news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Oakville, Ontario, offering drug-free skeletal strengthening technology.

news.summary: The Identity Management Awards have been presented to four outstanding recipients this year. The Kraft Heinz Company and Motability Operations have been recognized as the Identity Projects of the Year. Instacart has received the award for Innovative Use, while Carmen Elena Nedelcu has been named Leader of the Year. These recipients have all demonstrated exceptional leadership in identity security and have been honored for their contributions in this crucial field.
news.headline: Identity Defined Security Alliance celebrates Identity Management Day 2025, awards Kraft Heinz, Motability Operations for top projects, Instacart for innovation, and Carmen Elena Nedelcu as Leader of the Year.

news.summary: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida on April 17, 2025, Identity Dental Marketing received accolades for being the top Dental Marketing Agency, as rated by dentists nationwide. The recognition stems from glowing reviews emphasizing the agency's success in generating steady increases in new patients, among other achievements.
news.headline: Identity Dental Marketing named Best Dental Marketing Agency nationwide, recognized for driving consistent new patient growth.

news.summary: Archer (NYSE: ACHR) recently announced a groundbreaking initiative in partnership with United Airlines to introduce a cutting-edge air taxi network in New York City. This innovative project aims to revolutionize transportation for residents and visitors, allowing them to swiftly travel from Manhattan to nearby airports in just 5-15 minutes. The air taxi, named Midnight, is set to dramatically reduce travel times in comparison to conventional ground transportation, providing a quick and efficient means of navigating the city and bypassing its infamous traffic congestion.
news.headline: Archer partners with United Airlines to launch NYC air taxi network for quick airport transfers. Travel from Manhattan in 5-15 mins.

news.summary: In Virginia Beach, Virginia on April 17, 2025, a renowned company named OpenMetal revealed their plans for expanding their global data center presence. They introduced a new data center in Singapore, further solidifying their position as a top provider of on-demand private cloud infrastructure as a service (IaaS). This move marks a significant step for OpenMetal in enhancing their operational capacity internationally.
news.headline: OpenMetal expands to Singapore with new data center, strengthening its global presence in delivering private cloud IaaS.
Fed's Williams: Growth this year is likely significantly slower and unemployment up.
Fed's Williams: I won't make a prediction about recessions.
Fed's Williams: The Fed needs to make sure one time change in prices doesn't affect longer run.
Fed's Williams: It's essential to keep inflation expectations anchored.

news.summary: ACR Poker's Main Satellite event on Sunday, April 27th will offer two exclusive Montenegro packages worth over $110,000 each. Hosted in San Jose, Costa Rica, this event marks the beginning of ACR Poker's High Stakes Adventure. Two fortunate players will secure the opportunity to embark on an unforgettable journey to Montenegro.
news.headline: ACR Poker offers 2 Montenegro packages worth $110,000+ each through Main Satellite on April 27th. Exciting high stakes series.
Fed's Williams: Tariffs will definitely impact inflation this year, unclear how long it persists.
Fed's Williams: Key is to watch how trade policies affect inflation.
Fed's Williams: Recent inflation has been good news but still above target.

news.summary: St. Louis-based company Cass Information Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASS) announced their first quarter 2025 earnings, with $0.66 per diluted share, showing growth from $0.52 in the first quarter of 2024 and $0.33 in the fourth quarter of 2024. The net income for this period reached $9.0 million, marking a 25.4% increase from $7.2 million in the same period in 2024 and a substantial $4.4 million spike, equivalent to a 95.2% growth, compared to the fourth quarter of 2024. These results indicate a positive trend for the company.
news.headline: Cass Info Systems Q1 2025: Earnings $0.66/share (up from $0.52 in Q1 2024), Net income $9.0M (+25.4% YoY).

news.summary: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. will announce its fiscal first quarter results for the period ending March 30, 2025, on May 7, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for 7:00 AM EST, followed by a conference call at 8:30 AM EST on the same day to discuss the financial results. The call will be live streamed on the Company’s website at http://www.bloominbrands.com in the Investors section. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the Company’s website after the call. Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq as BLMN.
news.headline: Bloomin’ Brands, Inc. will release Q1 results on May 7, 2025, at 7:00 AM EST followed by a conference call at 8:30 AM EST.

news.summary: In March, Super Micro Computer, Inc. has become the most heavily shorted large-cap security amidst escalating worries over U.S. tariffs and tech industry instability. According to Hazeltree's Shortside Crowdedness Report, there has been a significant shift away from tech investments. The report showed a decrease from eight to five in the number of top 10 most crowded shorted large-cap securities from February to March. Hazeltree, a prominent player in active treasury management, highlighted these trends as the industry navigates through increasing uncertainties.
news.headline: Super Micro Computer is the most crowded shorted large-cap security in March, with sector rotation out of tech.

news.summary: In Denver, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) revealed the appointment of Chris Hayden as Senior Vice President of IT and Enterprise Applications. Hayden, joining the leading distributed solar energy assets company in the US, will enhance Spruce's service platform, expand the Spruce PRO service, and lead innovation in the IT department covering strategy, infrastructure, and application development.
news.headline: Spruce names Chris Hayden as Senior VP of IT and Enterprise Applications, to enhance service platform and drive innovation.
Fed's Williams: Inflation expectations are important to watch right now.
Fed's Williams: It's really hard to say what Fed will do with rate policy.
Fed's Williams: Market pricing reflects uncertainty about outlook.
Fed's Williams: My basic views on monetary policy haven't fundamentally changed.

news.summary: In Milwaukee, Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) announced its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The highlights of the first quarter of 2025 include reaching total sales of $222.2 million, marking a 13% increase compared to the previous year's $196.3 million. Operating earnings saw a significant uptick of 35% year-over-year to $49.5 million. Operating profit margins also expanded by 360 basis points, growing from 18.6% to 22.2%. Diluted earnings per share (EPS) rose by 31%, reaching $1.30 compared to $0.99 in the same quarter of the prior year. Additionally, they successfully completed certain undisclosed business activities during this period.
news.headline: Badger Meter (BMI) reports strong Q1 2025 results: Total sales $222.2M (+13%), operating earnings $49.5M (+35%), EPS $1.30 (+31%).

news.summary: ADS-TEC Energy, a renowned company in battery-based energy storage and fast-charging systems (NASDAQ: ADSE), will showcase its newest products and services at the Power2Drive trade fair in Munich from May 7 to 9, 2025. Located at Hall B6, Booth 210, the company will present innovative solutions such as the ChargePost, ChargeBox, and the new large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). Based in Nürtingen, Germany, ADS-TEC Energy is known for its cutting-edge EV charging technologies and is set to exhibit its multifunctional fast EV charging solutions at the event.
news.headline: ADS-TEC Energy to showcase innovative products at Power2Drive trade fair in Munich from May 7-9, 2025. Leader in battery-based energy storage and fast charging systems. Booth 210, Hall B6. $ADSE.

news.summary: A new entrant named MAP Medical has recently launched operations in Chicago on April 17, 2025, with the aim of revolutionizing healthcare product supply chains. This innovative company focuses on offering top-notch medical supplies at affordable prices, striving to enhance efficiency in the industry. Their goal is to provide quality products while keeping costs low, catering to the needs of healthcare facilities. This development showcases a significant step towards improving access to essential medical supplies, potentially impacting many institutions in the healthcare sector.
news.headline: New company MAP Medical aims to streamline healthcare product supply chains by providing high-quality, affordable medical supplies. Launching officially on April 17, 2025 in Chicago.

news.summary: The noteworthy exhibition is one of 12 global displays commemorating the 100th anniversary of the Leica I camera. The Leica Store & Gallery in New York City is excited to announce the showcase of 100 YEARS OF LEICA, honoring the centennial milestone of the iconic camera.
news.headline: Leica Store & Gallery NY showcases "In Conversation" with Bruce Davidson and Sara Messinger, part of 100 YEARS OF LEICA exhibit.
